prompt: A deadlines board grouping clients by urgency — filing deadline this week, this month, and later — with each client's document progress on their card.
wire:
export default function DeadlinesBoard() { const [clients, setClients] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listDeadlines({}).then((r) => { setClients(r.data || []); setLoading(false); }); }, []); const now = new Date("2026-07-21"); const endOfWeek = new Date(now); endOfWeek.setDate(now.getDate() + (7 - now.getDay())); const endOfMonth = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() + 1, 0); const groups = [ { key: "week", label: "This week", tone: "danger", clients: clients.filter((c) => { const d = new Date(c.filingDeadline); return d >= now && d <= endOfWeek; }), }, { key: "month", label: "This month", tone: "warning", clients: clients.filter((c) => { const d = new Date(c.filingDeadline); return d > endOfWeek && d <= endOfMonth; }), }, { key: "later", label: "Later", tone: "neutral", clients: clients.filter((c) => { const d = new Date(c.filingDeadline); return d > endOfMonth; }), }, ]; const daysUntil = (iso) => { const diff = new Date(iso) - now; return Math.ceil(diff / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); }; const toneColors = { danger: { bg: "#fef2f2", border: "#fca5a5", badge: "#B0473A", badgeText: "#fff" }, warning: { bg: "#fffbeb", border: "#fcd34d", badge: "#92400e", badgeText: "#fff" }, neutral: { bg: "#f9f9f8", border: "#ECEBE8", badge: "#46443f", badgeText: "#fff" }, }; const statusVariant = (s) => { if (!s) return "neutral"; if (s === "missing" || s === "overdue") return "danger"; if (s === "needs_review" || s === "review") return "warning"; if (s === "complete" || s === "verified") return "success"; return "neutral"; }; const humanStatus = (s) => { if (!s) return "Unknown"; return s.replace(/_/g, " ").replace(/\b\w/g, (c) => c.toUpperCase()); }; if (loading) { return (
Loading deadlines…
); } return (
{groups.map((group) => { const colors = toneColors[group.tone]; return (
{group.label} {group.clients.length} client{group.clients.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
{group.clients.length === 0 ? (
{group.key === "week" ? "No filing deadlines this week — nothing urgent." : group.key === "month" ? "No deadlines remaining this month." : "No clients with later deadlines."}
) : (
{group.clients.map((client) => { const days = daysUntil(client.filingDeadline); const received = client.documentsReceived ?? 0; const total = client.documentsTotal ?? 0; const ratio = total > 0 ? received / total : 0; const pct = Math.round(ratio * 100); const missing = client.missingDocumentTypes || []; return (
{/* Header */}
{client.name}
{client.entityType && (
{client.entityType.replace(/_/g, " ").replace(/\b\w/g, (c) => c.toUpperCase())}
)}
{days === 0 ? "Due today" : days === 1 ? "1 day" : `${days} days`}
{/* Deadline */}
Filing deadline {new Date(client.filingDeadline).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })}
{/* Document progress */}
Documents {received} of {total} collected ({pct}%)
{/* Status */} {client.status && (
Status {humanStatus(client.status)}
)} {/* Missing doc types */} {missing.length > 0 && (
Still missing
{missing.slice(0, 4).map((doc, i) => ( {doc} ))} {missing.length > 4 && ( +{missing.length - 4} more )}
)} {/* Assigned staff */} {client.assignedStaff && (
Assigned to {client.assignedStaff}
)}
); })}
)}
); })}
); }
